# Emet Capital
> Australia's private lending brokerage — connecting borrowers with non-bank and private lenders for property, business, and asset-backed finance.

## Core Topics
- Private lending in Australia
- Second mortgages
- Bridging finance
- Commercial property lending
- Asset-backed lending
- Business loans and commercial finance
